name: llm-wiki
description: LLM-compiled knowledge bases for Codex. Build topic-scoped wikis, ingest sources, compile articles, query, lint, research, and generate outputs.

interface.shortDescription: Build and maintain topic-scoped research wikis
interface.longDescription: Bundle the llm-wiki workflow for Codex: initialize a wiki, ingest sources, compile articles, query knowledge, lint structure, run research, and generate outputs.
defaultPrompt: Research a new topic and compile it into a wiki.
Ingest these notes into my wiki and update the indexes.
Lint this wiki and fix structural issues.
